game_name: Advanced Dungeons & Dragons: Heroes of the Lance

special_mechanics.name: Character Rotation System
special_mechanics.description: Eight heroes from Dragonlance series; only one visible on screen at a time. When on-screen hero dies, next hero in rotation appears. Other five heroes function as 'lives' similar to traditional action-platforming games.

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Three characters have special abilities: healing magic, wizard magic, and trap removal. Five other heroes act purely as lives with no special mechanics.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay overview but no specific physics parameters (movement speeds, gravity values, jump mechanics) are documented. Game described as side-scrolling action-adventure with frustrating difficulty. No technical movement documentation available.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Advanced Dungeons & Dragons: Heroes of the Lance
